history: First pair (v1 Compact Utilitarian / v2 Spacious & Expressive) rejected by stakeholder — too boring.

Second iteration: v1 redesigned as Page Card Hub (editorial), v2 redesigned as Spotlight Compass (geometric). v2 chosen as winning direction but requested strict-Blok refit (Geist Sans + Geist Mono, semantic tokens only).
Third iteration: v2 refit to strict Blok; v3 Action Wheel and v4 Content-Forward Stack added as alternative directions for final comparison.

values: Quick Copy URL / Path / ID — Sitecore Marketplace Page Context Panel app with buttons for copying the most-shared page metadata. Backlog entry in storage/marketplace-app-ideas.md shortlist #1.

stage_history.note: design-polish-1 branch — polish commits + real-tenant URL fetch fix (SDK-types refactor + targetHostname operator note in README)
Cycle 2 ship: ship-report-20260427T124015Z.md. Status upgraded shipped_with_caveats → shipped after real-tenant URL fix verified (subject to operator setting targetHostname per README).

notes: Marketplace Page Context Panel app (xmc:pages:contextpanel). Blok UI, dark default + theme switcher. 5 buttons: Live URL, Preview URL, Item ID, Page Title, Share Link (split-button: Markdown default, dropdown for Plain text). Keyboard shortcuts + visible legend. No toasts — button morphs on copy. Persistent error state until pageInfo.id changes.

critical_review: partial — Round 1 delivered (Problem / Goals / Scope). Stakeholder accepted scope answers, declined Problem/Goals challenges as overkill for a dogfood app, declined Round 2 (User Stories / FRs). Scope answers folded into PRD: full 5-button scope unconditional, R-001 Live URL ships in v0.1, clipboard = local copy in QuickCopy with no pageshot refactor (ADR-0004).
Backlog entry: storage/marketplace-app-ideas.md shortlist #1 (screenshot previously #2 moved to Shipped).
ADRs created during /create-prd: 0002 (extension point), 0003 (Blok UI), 0004 (clipboard local-copy).
planning_track: minimal — no architecture blueprint file written (canonical_artifacts.architecture stays null).

ADRs created during /architect (minimal track): 0005 (Marketplace Client-Side scaffold + pageshot mirror), 0006 (Live URL parallel pre-fetch composition), 0007 (version-keyed cache, no TTL), 0008 (Alt+L/P/I/T/S provisional shortcuts + Ctrl+Alt fallback), 0009 (persistent error state, no retry), 0010 (Share Link composed from Blok Button+DropdownMenu).

Open Questions resolved by architect: OQ-001 (shortcuts → ADR-0008), OQ-002 (split-button keyboard → ADR-0010), OQ-006 (cache invalidation → ADR-0007). OQ-003 / OQ-004 / OQ-005 / OQ-008 still open (UX writing / UI design / v0.2 deferral).

UI design selected: v2 Spotlight Compass (geometric / modern; asymmetric 2x2 grid + bottom Share Link strip; Blok-primary gradient mesh atmosphere). Strict-Blok refit verified: Geist Sans + Geist Mono only (Blok Nova preset), semantic tokens only (97 hsl(var(--token)) references in styles.css), zero raw hex, zero non-Blok fonts. POC at products/quickcopy/pocs/poc-v2/ is the canonical visual source of truth for implementation.
